item.title: Version 2026.03.12
item.description:
What's New in 2026.03.12

  • Whisper hallucination filtering — foreign-language text (e.g., Korean "감사합니다!") no longer appended to English batch transcriptions. Added trailing foreign-script detection that strips text when the dominant script is >70% of output.
  • Streaming artifacts removed — `[ Silence ]` and `[ Inaudible ]` markers no longer inserted at the cursor during streaming. Both real-time deltas and stop-time hypothesis text now pass through artifact removal.
  • Tighter batch decoding thresholds — added `compressionRatioThreshold: 1.8` to batch mode (matching streaming), catching repetitive hallucinations at the WhisperKit level.

All transcription happens 100% locally on your device.
